records.content_snippet:
version: "3.9"

x-agent-base: &agent-base
  build:
    context: ../..
    dockerfile: deploy/docker/dockerfiles/base-python.Dockerfile
  environment:
    POSTGRES_URL: ${POSTGRES_URL}
    REDIS_URL: ${REDIS_URL}
    ELEPHANT_ENV: ${ELEPHANT_ENV:-development}
    LOG_LEVEL: ${LOG_LEVEL:-INFO}
    ORCHESTRATOR_URL: http://orchestrator:8000
    HEARTBEAT_INTERVAL_SECONDS: "30"
    DAILY_BUDGET_USD: ${DAILY_BUDGET_USD:-10.00}
  depends_on:
    orchestrator:
      condition: service_healthy
  restart: unless-stopped
  networks:
    - elephant_net

services:

  # ─── INFRASTRUCTURE ───────────────────────────────────────────

  postgres:
    image: postgres:16-alpine
    environment:
      POSTGRES_DB: ${POSTGRES_DB:-elephant}
      POSTGRES_USER: ${POSTGRES_USER:-elephant}
      POSTGRES_PASSWORD: ${POSTGRES_PASSWORD}
    volumes:
      - postgres_data:/var/lib/postgresql/data
    ports:
      - "5432:5432"
    networks:
      - elephant_net
    healthcheck:
      test: ["CMD-SHELL", "pg_isready -U ${POSTGRES_USER:-elephant}"]
      interval: 5s
      timeout: 5s
      retries: 15

  redis:
    image: redis:7-alpine
    command: redis-server --requirepass ${REDIS_PASSWORD} --appendonly yes
    volumes:
      - redis_data:/data
    ports:
      - "6379:6379"
    networks:
      - elephant_net
    healthcheck:
      test: ["CMD", "redis-cli", "-a", "${REDIS_PASSWORD}", "ping"]
      interval: 5s
      timeout: 5s
      retries: 15

  qdrant:
    image: qdrant/qdrant:v1.9.2
    volumes:
      - qdrant_data:/qdrant/storage
    ports:
      - "6333:6333"
    networks:
      - elephant_net
    restart: unless-stopped

  neo4j:
    image: neo4j:5.19-community
    environment:
      NEO4J_AUTH: neo4j/${NEO4J_PASSWORD}
    volumes:
      - neo4j_data:/data
    ports:
      - "7474:7474"
      - "7687:7687"
    networks:
      - elephant_net
    restart: unless-stopped

  # ─── CORE SERVICES ────────────────────────────────────────────

  orchestrator:
    build:
      context: ../..
      dockerfile: services/orchestrator/Dockerfile
    ports:
      - "8000:8000"
    environment:
      POSTGRES_URL: ${POSTGRES_URL}
      REDIS_URL: ${REDIS_URL}
      ELEPHANT_ENV: ${ELEPHANT_ENV:-development}
      LOG_LEVEL: ${LOG_LEVEL:-INFO}
      SERVICE_NAME: orchestrator
    depends_on:
      postgres:
        condition: service_healthy
      redis:
        condition: service_healthy
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - elephant_net
    healthcheck:
      test: ["CMD-SHELL", "curl -sf http://localhost:8000/health || exit 1"]
      interval: 10s
      timeout: 5s
      retries: 15

  dashboard_backend:
    build:
      context: ../..
      dockerfile: services/dashboard/backend/Dockerfile
    ports:
      - "8001:8001"
    environment:
      ORCHESTRATOR_URL: http://orchestrator:8000
      ELEPHANT_ENV: ${ELEPHANT_ENV:-development}
      LOG_LEVEL: ${LOG_LEVEL:-INFO}
      SERVICE_NAME: dashboard_backend
    depends_on:
      orchestrator:
        condition: service_healthy
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - elephant_net
    healthcheck:
      test: ["CMD-SHELL", "curl -sf http://localhost:8001/health || exit 1"]
      interval: 10s
      timeout: 5s
      retries: 10

  # ─── AGENTS ───────────────────────────────────────────────────

  agent_watchdog:
    <<: *agent-base
    build:
      context: ../..
      dockerfile: services/agents/watchdog/Dockerfile
    environment:
      POSTGRES_URL: ${POSTGRES_URL}
      REDIS_URL: ${REDIS_URL}
      ELEPHANT_ENV: ${ELEPHANT_ENV:-development}
      LOG_LEVEL: ${LOG_LEVEL:-INFO}
      ORCHESTRATOR_URL: http://orchestrator:8000
      AGENT_NAME: watchdog
      SERVICE_NAME: agent_watchdog
      HEARTBEAT_INTERVAL_SECONDS: "15"
      DAILY_BUDGET_USD: ${DAILY_BUDGET_USD:-10.00}

  agent_interacter:
    <<: *agent-base
    build:
      context: ../..
      dockerfile: services/agents/interacter/Dockerfile
    ports:
      - "8010:8010"
    environment:
      POSTGRES_URL: ${POSTGRES_URL}
      REDIS_URL: ${REDIS_URL}
      ELEPHANT_ENV: ${ELEPHANT_ENV:-development}
      LOG_LEVEL: ${LOG_LEVEL:-INFO}
      ORCHESTRATOR_URL: http://orchestrator:8000
      AGENT_NAME: interacter
      SERVICE_NAME: agent_interacter
      HEARTBEAT_INTERVAL_SECONDS: "30"

  agent_planner:
    <<: *agent-base
    environment:
      POSTGRES_URL: ${POSTGRES_URL}
      REDIS_URL: ${REDIS_URL}
      ELEPHANT_ENV: ${ELEPHANT_ENV:-development}
      LOG_LEVEL: ${LOG_LEVEL:-INFO}
      ORCHESTRATOR_URL: http://orchestrator:8000
      AGENT_NAME: planner
      SERVICE_NAME: agent_planner
      HEARTBEAT_INTERVAL_SECONDS: "30"

  agent_researcher:
    <<: *agent-base
    environment:
      POSTGRES_URL: ${POSTGRES_URL}
      REDIS_URL: ${REDIS_URL}
      ELEPHANT_ENV: ${ELEPHANT_ENV:-development}
      LOG_LEVEL: ${LOG_LEVEL:-INFO}
      ORCHESTRATOR_URL: http://orchestrator:8000
      AGENT_NAME: researcher
      SERVICE_NAME: agent_researcher
      HEARTBEAT_INTERVAL_SECONDS: "30"

  agent_creator:
    <<: *agent-base
    environment:
      POSTGRES_URL: ${POSTGRES_URL}
      REDIS_URL: ${REDIS_URL}
      ELEPHANT_ENV: ${ELEPHANT_ENV:-development}
      LOG_LEVEL: ${LOG_LEVEL:-INFO}
      ORCHESTRATOR_URL: http://orchestrator:8000
      AGENT_NAME: creator
      SERVICE_NAME: agent_creator
      HEARTBEAT_INTERVAL_SECONDS: "30"

  agent_visual:
    <<: *agent-base
    environment:
      POSTGRES_URL: ${POSTGRES_URL}
      REDIS_URL: ${REDIS_URL}
      ELEPHANT_ENV: ${ELEPHANT_ENV:-development}
      LOG_LEVEL: ${LOG_LEVEL:-INFO}
      ORCHESTRATOR_URL: http://orchestrator:8000
      AGENT_NAME: visual
      SERVICE_NAME: agent_visual
      HEARTBEAT_INTERVAL_SECONDS: "30"

  agent_critic:
    <<: *agent-base
    environment:
      POSTGRES_URL: ${POSTGRES_URL}
      REDIS_URL: ${REDIS_URL}
      ELEPHANT_ENV: ${ELEPHANT_ENV:-development}
      LOG_LEVEL: ${LOG_LEVEL:-INFO}
      ORCHESTRATOR_URL: http://orchestrator:8000
      AGENT_NAME: critic
      SERVICE_NAME: agent_critic
      HEARTBEAT_INTERVAL_SECONDS: "30"

  agent_memory_agent:
    <<: *agent-base
    environment:
      POSTGRES_URL: ${POSTGRES_URL}
      REDIS_URL: ${REDIS_URL}
      ELEPHANT_ENV: ${ELEPHANT_ENV:-development}
      LOG_LEVEL: ${LOG_LEVEL:-INFO}
      ORCHESTRATOR_URL: http://orchestrator:8000
      AGENT_NAME: memory_agent
      SERVICE_NAME: agent_memory_agent
      HEARTBEAT_INTERVAL_SECONDS: "30"

  agent_executor:
    <<: *agent-base
    environment:
      POSTGRES_URL: ${POSTGRES_URL}
      REDIS_URL: ${REDIS_URL}
      ELEPHANT_ENV: ${ELEPHANT_ENV:-development}
      LOG_LEVEL: ${LOG_LEVEL:-INFO}
      ORCHESTRATOR_URL: http://orchestrator:8000
      AGENT_NAME: executor
      SERVICE_NAME: agent_executor
      HEARTBEAT_INTERVAL_SECONDS: "30"

  agent_auditor:
    <<: *agent-base
    environment:
      POSTGRES_URL: ${POSTGRES_URL}
      REDIS_URL: ${REDIS_URL}
      ELEPHANT_ENV: ${ELEPHANT_ENV:-development}
      LOG_LEVEL: ${LOG_LEVEL:-INFO}
      ORCHESTRATOR_URL: http://orchestrator:8000
      AGENT_NAME: auditor
      SERVICE_NAME: agent_auditor
      HEARTBEAT_INTERVAL_SECONDS: "30"

  agent_reporter:
    <<: *agent-base
    environment:
      POSTGRES_URL: ${POSTGRES_URL}
      REDIS_URL: ${REDIS_URL}
      ELEPHANT_ENV: ${ELEPHANT_ENV:-development}
      LOG_LEVEL: ${LOG_LEVEL:-INFO}
      ORCHESTRATOR_URL: http://orchestrator:8000
      AGENT_NAME: reporter
      SERVICE_NAME: agent_reporter
      HEARTBEAT_INTERVAL_SECONDS: "30"

volumes:
  postgres_data:
  redis_data:
  qdrant_data:
  neo4j_data:

networks:
  elephant_net:
    driver: bridge
